key_decisions.D4: Admin = app + users; Dev = build pipeline + dev process
key_decisions.D7: Every tab gets web-to-CLI handoff clipboard commands
key_decisions.tab_structure: 6 tabs + 1 header widget: Health, Debt, Reviews, Pipeline, Governance, Planning

pre_work_required: BUG-01: Fix lowercase status strings in debt-health.js before any dashboard code
Install: recharts (via npx shadcn@latest add chart), @tanstack/react-table, @tanstack/react-virtual, minisearch
Install missing shadcn components: badge, table, tooltip, dropdown-menu, checkbox
scripts/build-dashboard-data.js needs to be created and wired as prebuild
All public/*.json output files must be gitignored
scripts/health/ack-warning.js and scripts/health/suppress-alert.js need to be created
scripts/tasks/mark-done.js needs to be created for Tab 6 sprint board primary action
npm run health:audit alias missing — add to package.json
confirmed_working: resolve-dependencies.js --json works today — no pre-work needed for sprint board
Recharts 3.x supports React 19.2.4 with no overrides
metrics-log.jsonl 6-field schema is intentional design, not a bug
type-check pre-push check (renamed from tsc) is passing
broken_data_sources: commit-log.jsonl: all 634 records seeded, daily count only — no branch/file breakdown
reviews-archive.jsonl: fixed/deferred/total counts are 0 in most records — pattern frequency only
SonarCloud health: null in virtually every health-score-log entry
key_schema_surprises: Two independent health systems: technical health (D/67 ecosystem-health-log) vs process health (B/87 health-score-log)
reviews.jsonl has 3 incompatible schemas requiring schema_version branching
review-needed.jsonl is 27 dedup pairs, not 27 individual items
hook and pr ecosystem audit history files have schema drift mid-file
enforcement-manifest.jsonl upgraded from MEDIUM to HIGH relevance (17% automated gate coverage signal)
